column1: # Moonstone Reborn regression goldens.  Columns are TAB-separated:
#   name <tab> kind <tab> input <tab> frame <tab> golden
# kind=ramfnv : cold-boot to <frame>, FNV-1a hash of all RAM == golden  (engine/behaviour)
#   input is "cold" (ignored).  Catches any unintended change to game behaviour.
# kind=framesha : loadstate <input>.sav, render frame <frame>, SHA-256 == golden  (display)
#   input is a save filename under dist/MoonstoneNative/ (local, not in repo).
# Re-baseline after an INTENTIONAL change:  python recomp/regress/check.py --update
# kind=savefnv : loadstate <input>.sav (frozen fixture, under dist/MoonstoneNative/),
#   run <frame> frames with --os, FNV-1a of all RAM == golden.  Exercises GAMEPLAY
#   paths (combat AI, sound protocol, PC hooks) the cold goldens never reach.
# ramfnv input "os" = full HLE boot running the real attract; frame 4000 covers the
#   window (2000-3000) where an unguarded hook misfire once hid from the 500-frame golden.
determinism
attract
combatrun
vanishrun
townday
townarmor
combat
overland
